pr.title: Non-Record: First Viable 3-Loop Recurrence — Birkhoff + Output-LN + Timestep Scaling (val_bpb=1.2659, 14 eff layers from 6 unique blocks)

output.summary: Shared 3-loop recurrence stabilizes via Output-LN, Birkhoff-constrained mixing, and capped timestep scaling to tame quantization blowup across iterations.
techniques: Output-LN on MLP outputs for loop-specific magnitudes
Birkhoff-constrained residual mixing with spectral norm ≤1
Float16-capped timestep scalars to shrink the Q-gap
